title: agathis robusta var. palmerstonii
intro: Agathis robusta var. palmerstonii, also known as the Norfolk Island kauri, is a rare and endemic species of coniferous tree native to Norfolk Island in the Pacific Ocean. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Agathis robusta var. palmerstonii include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its resin, which is extracted and used to create teas, tinctures, and salves.
